message:
chore(audit): batch 537 — deep service combinator review, 8 modules SOUND

retry.rs: service held across backoff is Drop-safe (RAII)
reconnect.rs: TOCTOU impossible (&mut self exclusion)
load_balance.rs: orphaned metrics freed on Arc drop
concurrency_limit.rs: OwnedSemaphorePermit Drop on all paths
bulkhead.rs: CAS cap + permit Drop + anti-barge correct
fabric.rs: prune_cells worst-case is perf concern, not bug
supervision.rs: restart plan correct for all 3 policies
error/recovery.rs: NaN multiplier → 0ms, LOW severity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
